knowledgeBase.content: Parent: CTI Group Worldwide Services Inc. (CEO: Robert Upchurch). Divisions: GHR (cruise/maritime), J-1 Placements (cultural exchange), J-1 Housing, CTI Marine, UNO Division (uniforms), Baron Promotions, Marine Travel. Reporting lines pending upload from Operations Lead.

Standard recruiting lifecycle: source → screen → present → interview → offer → onboarding. Per-domain variations: cruise (STCW + ENG-1 gates), J-1 (DS-2019 + sponsor gate), hospitality (host approval gate). Full step-by-step pending upload.
Onboarding deliverables per program type. Pending upload from Operations Lead.
Offboarding/repatriation deliverables per program type. Pending upload from Operations Lead.

Zoho stack in use: CRM (operational records), Books (org_id 877439787, USD), Desk (support), Projects, Forms. Data flow: Zoho CRM is the system of record for partner/candidate records; Zoho Books for finance; Poseidon V6 dashboard reads from Zoho via MCP for live KPIs.

Poseidon V6 M365 refresh cadence (Robert standing order 2026-04-29): M-F 7am-4pm every 10min; weekends only 8/12/4. Skills library refresh: per-agent cadence specified in each domain's _meta.refreshFrequency. System Check button runs invariants on demand.

Canonical POSEIDON path: C:\Users\ceo\OneDrive - CTI Group Worldwide Services Inc\POSEIDON. Repo: C:\Projects\Poseidon (moved out of OneDrive 2026-05-07 — git was blocked by OneDrive VFS reparse point). Travel backup mirror: I:\POSEIDON. Naming conventions pending upload.

Standing rule: agents draft, never send. Customer-facing emails always require Robert review. Internal Slack/email: agents may post status updates only after Robert sign-off on the channel + cadence. Escalation paths to be formalized by Operations Lead.

rules.if: Sync moves data across the strict-partition boundary (cruise ↔ J-1)

decisionTrees.escalateTo: Robert (CEO) for cross-partition; Operations Lead otherwise

rules.then: Run poseidonHealth(); follow standing rules in CLAUDE.md
Verify on live URL with chrome MCP before declaring fixed (Robert standing order 2026-04-29)

decisionTrees.escalateTo: Operations Lead → Robert if unresolved in 1h

dataSources.name: Zoho One (CRM, Books, Desk, Projects, Forms)

escalationRules.action: Run poseidonHealth + auto-repair; escalate if 1h unresolved
